description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push. Use multiple jobs with different configurations: AppleClang on MacOS 10.15 and 11 with C++17 and C++20, GCC 9, 10, and 11 on ubuntu-20.04 with C++17 and C++20, and Clang 9-13 on ubuntu-20.04 with C++17 and C++20 and both libc++ and libstdc++.
